title: Xiphopteris blepharidea

The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Xiphopteris blepharidea include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. As a member of the Polypodiales order, Xiphopteris blepharidea shares characteristics with other ferns.
